server_clock.description: Real-time server clock with local time and Season 1 countdown timer
changes: Added ServerClock component with real-time updates
Server time display (UTC-2 timezone)
Local time display with timezone detection
Season 1 countdown timer (ends Nov 23, 2025 19:59 EST)
Color-coded displays with theme support
Multi-language support (EN, ES, PT, DE, KO)
Responsive design for mobile and desktop

mobile_layout_fixes.description: Fixed mobile podium layout to show proper ranking order
changes: Separate mobile and desktop layouts for AlliancePodium
Mobile shows proper 1-2-3 ranking order
Desktop maintains visual podium effect (2-1-3)
Responsive design improvements

dev_tools_reorganization.description: Reorganized development tools into dedicated directory structure
changes: Moved dev_server.py to dev_tools/ directory
Enhanced development server GUI with multi-server support
Added comprehensive documentation and setup guides
Created launcher scripts and requirements files
Improved project organization following structure guidelines

documentation_reorganization.description: Moved multi-server documentation to docs/ directory for better organization
changes: Moved MULTI_SERVER_DEPLOYMENT.md to docs/
Moved MULTI_SERVER_MIGRATION.md to docs/
Updated documentation index with proper links
Enhanced root README.md with subfolder documentation links

translation_tools_enhancement.description: Reorganized and enhanced translation tools with enterprise-grade features
changes: Moved translation tools to translation_tools/ directory
Added AI-powered translation with LM Studio integration
15 language support with quality validation
Namespace filtering and resume capability
Comprehensive documentation and configuration management
